stock: [AM_TOP] Morning top setup
Board is hot enough for morning top capture
Morning top gain zone is matched
Price is pinned near the intraday high
Price is far above VWAP
Turnover can support a seal or reseal
Volume is active without obvious exhaustion
Main or super capital is net inflow
Deal amount supports fast T+1 exit
Morning run has enough vertical spread

buyPlan.trigger: Use only a morning top or near-limit shape; skip if it cannot hold the high platform.

sellPlan.targetTime: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless the board remains sealed.
sellPlan.strategy: AM_TOP setup: catch the next-morning premium after a morning top or limit-up hold; exit fast on failure.
sellPlan.timeWindow: Next trading day 09:30-10:00; sell before 10:00 unless the board remains sealed.

rules: Morning top weakens and fails to reseal or hold the high platform

Do not chase after the 09:40-10:00 decision window

news.title: 公告臻选｜捕捉每日公告中的“黄金机会”告别信息过载，把握市场先机，捕捉每天公告中的“黄金机会”。  2025-11-03 14:49
A股四大指数集体低开，工程机械板块逆势走强盘面上，半导体、芯片股领跌，内存、先进封装方向跌幅居前。  5分钟前
盘前必读丨宇树科技科创板IPO注册生效；中公教育相关投资者被暂停交易机构认为，A股高低切趋势显现，财报窗口期提高优质公司关注度。  1小时前
腾讯美团快手领涨，恒生科技指数连续反弹｜市场观察有市场人士依然担忧AI投入影响现金流。  昨天 21:00
医药板块放量反弹，近百只主题基金填平亏损，后市机会在哪？“产业在往前走，股价在往回走，这就是典型的错配。”  昨天 20:59
